*** 1 FATAL *** A COUPLE TRAVELING ALONG LINSCOTT RUN ROAD ENCOUNTERED HIGH WATER FLOWING ACROSS THE ROADWAY. THE CAR WAS INUNDATED WITH WATER...THE COUPLE MADE AN ATTEMPT TO GET TO DRY LAND ON FOOT. THE FEMALE SLIPPED AND WAS SWEPT AWAY...SHE WAS LATER FOUND DECEASED ABOUT A HALF A MILE AWAY FROM THE VEHICLE. THE MAN MADE IT TO DRY LAND SAFELY.
